column3: Welcome to the new term. Classes begin Monday.
Mid-term exams start April 28. Check the notice board.
Outstanding fees must be cleared by April 30.
Annual sports day is scheduled for May 10. All students must participate.
Library now open until 5pm on weekdays.
PTM scheduled for May 16. Parents are encouraged to attend.
The new ICT lab is now open for student use during free periods.
